meaning: n.阿尔萨斯(法国东北部一地名)
examples: Alsace-Lorraine was ceded to Germany by France in 1871.
Alsace has a good network of trains and buses.
I was born on September 30 1939 in Rosheim, a small medieval city of Alsace in France.
In Alsace, it is a go-to wine with smoky pork chops, sausage and choucroute.
Geographically speaking Alsace is located in the upper eastern edge of France along the German border.
